overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night, featuring traditional Japanese-style architecture mixed with futuristic neon signage. Heavy rain creates atmospheric haze and reflective wet surfaces as the camera moves along the sidewalk, encountering scattered pedestrians and urban debris. The scene is clearly from a high-quality game engine with cinematic lighting and teal-dominant color grading.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a heavy rain night in a cyberpunk city, walking along a wet sidewalk beside a traditional Japanese-style building. A pedestrian with a black umbrella approaches and passes by on the left. Street lamps cast bright beams through the rain, and a distant neon billboard glows through the haze.

segments.scene_description: Moving past the traditional building, the scene reveals urban clutter including green dumpsters and parked cars along the curb. A large pedestrian in a green tank top passes by on the left. The palm trees and street lamps continue lining the path as the rain persists.

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk becomes more cluttered with utility poles, open dumpsters, and piles of blue trash bags. No pedestrians are visible in this stretch. The neon billboard grows larger on the right as the camera approaches, and palm trees continue lining the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with warning sign and turning point

segments.scene_description: Approaching a street corner, a prominent sign reading 'THE END IS NEAR' becomes visible among trash bags on the left. The camera turns left around the corner, revealing more traditional buildings. The neon billboard recedes into the distance as the perspective shifts down the new street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk street that transitions from a clean architectural facade into a cluttered urban alleyway. It begins by gliding along a wet sidewalk beside a traditional Japanese-style building, passing a pedestrian with a black umbrella under the bright beams of street lamps. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts toward a more industrial atmosphere, passing parked cars and green dumpsters while a man in a green tank top crosses the path. The environment then becomes increasingly derelict, with the camera navigating past utility poles and piles of blue trash bags as a distant neon billboard grows larger on the right. Finally, the path leads toward a street corner marked by a sign reading THE END IS NEAR, before turning left to reveal a new row of traditional buildings as the neon glow recedes into the distance.
